name: x-2002275-uddnrs
description: Unified Disaster Damage and Needs Reporting System (UDDNRS) is a digital system that standardizes and collects post-disaster damage and needs reports from citizens, LGUs, and national agencies into one unified format. Post-disaster self-reports vary (photos, narratives), making rapid national aggregation for relief targeting and rehabilitation planning difficult; plans call for harmonized indicators and reporting but field submissions remain heterogeneous. It improves consistency of data and enables faster and more organized decision-making for disaster response and recovery.
